completed_tasks: Removed the complete src/app/voicings App Router segment and five route-local TSX files.
Removed the complete src/app/music-fonts App Router segment, its route-local client component, and CSS module.
Reduced the GNB to a brand/home link plus direct Canvas and Songs links.
Replaced filled pill navigation with plain Geist text links, semantic color tokens, aria-current, and a two-pixel active-route bottom indicator.
Changed the mobile header from a 113px two-row layout with 36px links to a single 64px row with 44px or 64px link targets.
Applied the existing --font-geist-sans variable directly to the header after computed-style verification identified a system-sans fallback.
Preserved remaining Canvas and Songs content, shared music utilities and assets, and all earlier route removals.
notes: The implementation uses existing Next.js Link, usePathname, cn, Tailwind, and shadcn semantic tokens; no new dependency or component primitive was required.
No global CSS, runtime theme variable, reusable semantic class, icon, Sheet, or hamburger interaction was added.
The existing AppNav client boundary remains narrowly scoped to current-route detection.
React best-practices review found semantic links, stable href keys, accessible current-route metadata, visible focus treatment, and no new hook, state, effect, or abstraction risk.
The Verifier refinement was addressed surgically in AppNav by applying the already-loaded Geist Sans variable; no layout or interaction decision changed.
